text: The Libra Scheduler shall manage sequential and embarrassingly parallel batch jobs.
The Libra Scheduler shall run on a homogenous Linux cluster.
The Libra Scheduler shall prioritize jobs based on user-specified budget and deadline constraints.
The Libra Scheduler shall allocate CPU time according to user utility.
The Libra Scheduler shall enforce resource allocations proportional to user priority using the stride scheduling algorithm.
The Libra Scheduler shall allow dynamic reallocation of resources for urgent jobs.
The Libra Scheduler shall support at least four Pentium-III workstations with 128 MB RAM.
The Libra Scheduler shall provide administrative security to prevent unauthorized alteration of scheduling criteria.
The Libra Scheduler shall provide a basic level of job accounting.
The Libra Scheduler shall interface with Sun Grid Engine version 5.3.
The Libra Scheduler shall use PVM and MPI libraries for embarrassingly parallel jobs.
The Libra Scheduler shall maintain a maximum bug rate of 1 bug per KLOC.
The system shall provide a maximum response time of 1 minute for job submission.
The Libra Scheduler shall ensure all jobs are completed within a 10% error allowance of the submitted statistics.
The Libra Scheduler shall limit the maximum cost charged to the user to the maximum cost submitted by the user.
The Libra Scheduler shall be written in standard C code.
The Libra Scheduler shall follow the Hungarian Naming Convention for all code.
The Libra Scheduler shall include a command-line interface for submitting jobs with deadline and cost parameters.
The Libra Scheduler shall allow administrators to cancel or resume any job.
The Libra Scheduler shall update the cluster status every time a job is scheduled or removed.
The Libra Scheduler shall select the execution host with the lowest CPU load.
The Libra Scheduler shall retrieve and parse job details including Job Id and Standalone Execution time.
The system shall verify if a user is valid before accepting job submissions.
The Libra Scheduler shall notify the user if a job is accepted or rejected based on feasibility.
The Libra Scheduler shall provide a Linux man page for on-line user documentation.
